subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord, my Hope, my Refuge, my Shelter, my Dwelling-place, my Haven and my Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و رجائی و کهفی و لهفی و مسکنی و ماوائی و عزی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
